trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four bullish signals firing — RSI in momentum zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price above SMA-20; uranium sector has strong structural tailwinds from nuclear energy policy.
Score 95 with clean technical setup; RSI at 61.4 leaves room before overbought, and Fastly's CDN infrastructure aligns with rising AI-driven internet traffic demand.
Score 95 fintech name with all bullish momentum signals intact and RSI at just 55.5 — significant runway before overbought territory with solid MACD confirmation.

decisions.briefing: Markets were flat today — NASDAQ and S&P 500 each up just 0.1%, a low-conviction consolidation session. With 5 open slots and over $1,100 in idle cash, the rules clearly call for deployment. I'm adding three score-95 names — UEC (nuclear energy sector momentum), FSLY (tech infrastructure), and SOFI (fintech) — all with RSIs well below overbought levels and full MACD confirmation. Existing positions are held; no stop-loss triggers identified.

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices ended virtually unchanged today, with the NASDAQ and S&P 500 each rising just 0.1% in a classic consolidation session following weeks of elevated volatility driven by tariff uncertainty. Investors appear to be in a holding pattern ahead of key earnings reports and further clarity on U.S.-China trade negotiations. Beneath the flat surface, sector-level divergence was notable — nuclear energy and select fintech names showed momentum while cyclicals lagged.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日幾乎原地踏步，納斯達克與標普500各僅微升0.1%，市場延續近期因關稅不確定性引發波動後的整理格局。投資者普遍觀望，靜待重磅企業財報及中美貿易談判進一步明朗化。儘管大盤平淡，板塊分化明顯——核能及部分金融科技股動能強勁，而周期性板塊相對落後。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift capital from one industry group to another based on changing economic conditions or momentum signals. Even on flat market days like today, individual sectors can show strong momentum — uranium and nuclear energy stocks scored 95 while the broad market barely moved. Identifying these rotations early is one of the primary ways active managers aim to outperform a passive index like VOO.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者依據經濟環境變化或動能信號，將資金從一個行業轉移至另一個行業的現象。即便像今日這樣大盤平靜無波，個別板塊仍可展現強勁動能——核能股今日動能評分高達95分，而大盤幾乎未動。及早捕捉此類輪動機會，正是主動管理者力圖跑贏VOO等被動指數的核心策略之一。
